title: 阿里云Agentic AI生产化活动邀约
full_text:
Agentic AI is moving to production. Join us for an engineering-led evening for builders shipping real agentic systems.
📅 25 June, 6-9 PM BST
📍 Tessl London
🎟️ https://t.co/Wc2nkwzcrW
Come with your questions! 🙌 https://t.co/2qkOtNOonw
